content.en:
The Forbidden Hall and Dao Mountain took refuge in the Nine Heavens forces, and Ye Tian didn't care.

Even the Void Heaven One Pulse and other forces established the Temple of the Gods, Ye Tian didn't pay much attention, he is now gradually out of the circle of the Void Heaven One Pulse, although he is still a disciple of the Void Heaven One Pulse, but he has almost no time to manage the affairs of the Void Heaven One Pulse.

If he really fell into the circle of the Void Heaven One Line, it would be difficult to get out, and in the future, he would even have to constantly deal with the affairs of the Temple of the Gods, and even be busy helping the Temple of the Gods to grab territory in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, and compete with those forces of the Upper Triple Heaven, and he would gradually lose time for cultivation.

He didn't want to get involved in these trivial matters now, he just wanted to get a stable cultivation environment.

Even, he gradually let the true ancestors of the human race get out of the Void Heaven Temple and return to the base camp of the human race.

At present, only a few of the true ancestors of the human race are serving in the Void Heaven Temple.

At present, the Terrans are gradually becoming independent, and although they are in the Void and True Kingdom, they are like a group, which is developing rapidly, and rarely participates in things outside the Terrans.

This is also a scene that Ye Tian wants to see!

He also wanted to help his master Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, and Void Heaven Dao Ancestor did help him a lot, but it was a pity that Void Heaven Dao Ancestor had a deep and deep control over power and power.

Ever since hundreds of Dao Ancestors were born in the Void Heaven One Vein, the ambition of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestors has swelled.

Now, Ye Tian even regretted taking out those Hedao treasures a little.

However, if you don't take out the treasure of the Convergence Dao, maybe the Void Heaven Vein will not be able to withstand the crises in the chaos, and maybe it will have already been destroyed.

Ye Tian would not persuade the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor now, but if the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor was in trouble in the future, he would still go to help.

this day.

Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue came with good news, they had stepped into the half-step True Ancestor realm, and they relied on their own abilities and did not use any external objects.

It can be seen that the talents of the two are very high, if Ye Tian does not copy the talent, he is not as good as his two children.

--------------------

Xuanxu Ancient Realm, Konjac True Country.

The Konjac True Kingdom is subordinate to the Konjac Gate, and it is just an ordinary big force in the Dao Mountain Realm, and there was originally only one Dao Ancestor, which is considered a very weak force.

Now, the Konjac True Kingdom has taken refuge in the Heavenly Spirit Sect, the sixth Heavenly Power of the Middle Triple Heavenly Forces, and is one of the many True Kingdoms under the command of the Heavenly Spirit Sect, constantly sending geniuses to the Heavenly Spirit Sect.

Originally, the Konjac True Country was located in a remote location and had almost no sense of existence.

But on this day, a big thing happened in Konjac Zhenguo.

An ancient well was born on a continent, and at first no one paid attention to this ancient well, but as some gods entered the ancient well and fell and died.

Gradually, this ancient well was discovered.

What's more, this ancient well has become a forbidden place for hundreds of millions of miles, and non-true monarchs are not allowed to enter it, otherwise they will be killed by a mysterious force.

Many people didn't know much about it and didn't know what kind of power it was, but when an ancient True Ancestor came here, his expression suddenly changed greatly.

Because this ancient well actually contains the power of darkness and taboo!

You know, the power of the dark forbidden is only found in the dark forbidden realm, how can the power of the dark forbidden be born here?

Is it the power of the dark forbidden that was born naturally, or is it that someone put the forbidden thing into the ancient well and leaks the power of the dark taboo.

So, this true ancestor entered the ancient well.

Soon after, more and more True Ancestors entered the interior of the Ancient Well, and a battle and battle began, and many True Ancestors fell and died.

After that, the Heavenly Spirit Sect got involved and tried to occupy this ancient well.

However, overnight, no one knew what happened to Konjac Makoku.

I only know that many forces have entered this area of the Konjac True Kingdom, only to see a ruin, and the entire True Kingdom has been blown up, and there is actually the power of Dao Ancestor among them.

This is because there is a force that has blocked this huge area, so that the battle inside cannot break out, and even the Dao Ancestor has forcibly awakened to fight.

The final result was very tragic, the Heavenly Spirit Sect was destroyed, and the Konjac True Kingdom was gone, and the other forces did not continue to fight, but blocked this area and did not allow anyone to enter for the time being.

......

The Upper Triple Heaven Forces once again held a meeting for the Konjac True Kingdom incident this time.

"Who destroyed the Heavenly Spirit Sect this time?"

Zi Chi True Ancestor was furious.

The force cultivated by the Heavenly Spirit Sect Master Zixia Sect can even be said to be an arm of the Zixia Sect, and now that this arm has been cut off, how can he not be angry?

"Zi Chi True Ancestor, what do you mean by this? Don't you think we did it?" King Kong City's Unbroken True Ancestor said coldly.

"Maybe you Zixia Sect did it yourself? After all, you are the top boss of the Heavenly Spirit Sect, if you want to destroy the Heavenly Spirit Sect, it will not be difficult for you to destroy the Heavenly Spirit Sect. Otherwise, even if the True Ancestors of the Heavenly Spirit Sect fell, they wouldn't even fall those Dao Ancestors!" an invincible True Ancestor spoke.

The other forces were also very suspicious, and they all looked at the Zixia Sect.

This time the matter is indeed very serious, the Heavenly Spirit Sect seems to only have the power of the Six Heavens, but there are also many surviving true ancestors of the Heavenly Spirit Sect, and they are all sleeping.

But not long ago, they went to investigate, the mountain gate of the Heavenly Spirit Sect was forced, countless True Ancestors fell, there was not a single living person, and they even saw the corpse of a Dao Ancestor.

These Dao Ancestors were forced to wake up from their slumber and fight with the enemy, but in the end, they were all killed in battle, even the Sixfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor of the Heavenly Spirit Sect was also killed in battle.

It's a pity that things happened too quickly, and the space where the Konjac True Kingdom and the Heavenly Spirit Sect were all blocked, and it was not discovered until the Heavenly Spirit Sect was destroyed.

With so many True Ancestors and Dao Ancestors, it is very difficult to destroy the Heavenly Spirit Sect, not ordinary forces can do it, but if the Zixia Sect is a surprise attack, it can do it.

"What do you mean, our Purple Xia Sect will kill our own people?" said the Purple Crimson True Ancestor angrily.

"In case there is some treasure, the Heavenly Spirit Sect wants to swallow it alone, and you want to extinguish it, it is not surprising that this situation will occur!" someone said.

Just when the many invincible true ancestors were making a noise, the Hebo True Ancestor of the Tianhai Sect spoke: "The Heavenly Spirit Sect will not be mentioned before it is destroyed, it is just a sixfold heavenly force, and if it is destroyed, it will be destroyed." At present, the most important thing is the forbidden ancient well where the konjac true country was born!"

As soon as they heard the Forbidden Ancient Well, all the Invincible True Ancestors had solemn faces.

Forbidden Gujing, they didn't know what it was at first, but this time the Dao Ancestors of the forces behind them awakened a wisp of consciousness and paid great attention to this matter.

And the forbidden ancient well was gradually known to them, and they understood what it meant.

"How could the Ancient Realm give birth to the Forbidden Well, this is not normal!"

An invincible true ancestor was very puzzled and puzzled, even if the Dao Ancestors behind him told him and even explained, he still couldn't understand it.

In fact, those Dao Ancestors were also very confused.

"Could it have something to do with the Heavenly Emperor's Palace?" someone speculated.

Others don't dare to comment indiscriminately, and that's not something they comment.

Hebo True Ancestor said, "Regardless of how it appeared, the most important thing for us at the moment is how to distribute the power of the Forbidden Ancient Well. Someone may have brought out a very precious treasure from it, but the value of a forbidden ancient well is far beyond what a treasure can explain. No one can take a forbidden ancient well, it's there, it can't run!"

"Distribution? How to distribute? Could it be that your Nine Heavens forces will distribute more, and our strength will be weaker, so we will distribute less? Or will everyone distribute it equally?"

If you don't break the true ancestor, you are very strong, and you are not afraid of offending the Tianhai Sect.

"Our Tianhai Sect is a Ninefold Heaven Force, isn't it normal to distribute more?"

One by one, the Invincible True Ancestors began to quarrel, and there was no way to talk about it.

In the end, these invincible true ancestors left one by one and did not continue to talk.

Obviously, none of the major forces want to give in, so they can only rely on their own abilities.

On the other side, Ye Tian also entered the small realm of the Wind King, and many generals of Black Wind Mountain also opened a meeting one by one to discuss the matter of the forbidden ancient well.
